name: Love of the Sea
original_name: វាយោសមុទ្រ
overview: From a boy in a fishing family in Kampot province, but suddenly he has to meet a person who does not know where he comes from and what he is for, just knowing that this heart feels like it is floating on the surface of the sea.

trailers.title: វាយោសមុទ្រ Love of the sea - Official Trailer
